audit_status.source_base: Greek Ephesians text tradition, draft aligned to public-domain comparison layer later
audit_status.review_note: Compact complete draft reviewed for mystery of nations as co-heirs, stewardship of grace, manifold wisdom to powers, rooted in love, fullness of Divine.

verses.restored: Because of this I, Paul, the prisoner of Messiah Jesus on behalf of you, the nations—
if indeed you heard of the stewardship/administration of the grace of the Divine given to me for you,
that according to unveiling the mystery was made known to me, just as I wrote before in brief,
by which, reading, you are able to perceive my insight in the mystery of Messiah,
which in other generations was not made known to the children of humans as now it has been unveiled to his holy apostles and prophets in Spirit:
that the nations are co-heirs and co-body and co-sharers of the promise in Messiah Jesus through the good news,
of which I became servant according to the gift of the grace of the Divine given to me according to the working of his power.
To me, the least of all holy ones, this grace was given: to announce to the nations the unsearchable riches of Messiah,
and to illuminate all as to what is the stewardship/administration of the mystery hidden from the ages in the Divine who created all things,
so that now, through the assembly, the many-sided wisdom of the Divine might be made known to the rulers and authorities in the heavenlies,
according to the purpose of the ages which he made in Messiah Jesus our Lord,
in whom we have boldness and access in confidence through his trust/faithfulness.
Therefore I ask you not to lose heart in my pressures on behalf of you, which is your glory.
Because of this I bend my knees toward the Father,
from whom every family/fatherhood in heavens and upon earth is named,
so that he may give you, according to the riches of his glory, to be strengthened with power through his Spirit in the inner human,
for Messiah to dwell through trust in your hearts, having been rooted and founded in love,
so that you may be fully strong to comprehend with all the holy ones what is the breadth and length and height and depth,
and to know the love of Messiah surpassing knowledge, so that you may be filled into all the fullness of the Divine.
Now to the One able to do beyond all things, beyond measure of what we ask or perceive, according to the power working in us,
to him be glory in the assembly and in Messiah Jesus into all generations of the age of the ages. Amen.

translation_notes: Syn- compounds in 3:6 are preserved as co-heirs, co-body, co-sharers to highlight radical shared belonging of nations in Messiah.
Many-sided wisdom in 3:10 preserves polypoikilos, the manifold/multicolored wisdom of the Divine made known through the assembly.
Fullness of Divine in 3:19 is the mystical high point of the prayer.
